message:
style(bubbles): Apply rustfmt formatting to filepicker, table, and textarea components

This commit applies consistent rustfmt formatting across the bubbles TUI
components crate, improving code readability without changing functionality.

Filepicker (filepicker.rs):
- Format method chains in highlighted_entry() calls to span multiple lines
- Improve readability of expect() calls in test assertions

Table (table.rs):
- Format multi-line assert_eq! calls with proper indentation
- Collapse single-element vec! macros to single lines
- Improve test assertion formatting for cursor operations

Textarea (textarea.rs):
- Format assert_eq! calls with long messages to multi-line format
- Improve assert! calls with compound conditions
- Format init() command assertion for clarity

E2E Standalone Tests (e2e_standalone.rs):
- Sort imports alphabetically (StartStopMsg, Stopwatch)

All changes are formatting-only via rustfmt, ensuring Rust 2024 edition
style consistency across the bubbles components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
